requests.prompt: Full-frame, edge-to-edge physical scene (no inner frame, border, inset, pasted image, or margins); not a product-only packshot. Use reference image 1 / examples/food/kangshifu-iced-black-tea.jpg as the real product identity lock; preserve Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle shape, colors, material, packaging, labels, and visible marks. Place that exact bottle upright, plausible scale and orientation, on a clean light wood table on a small sunlit balcony/patio. Next to it, a simple natural straw sun hat. Background: soft-focus balcony railing and exactly one leafy green potted plant. Warm afternoon sunlight with gentle highlights and soft, non-harsh shadows to suggest a hot day. Calm medium shot clearly showing bottle and setting. No hand/person. No captions, UI, posters, watermarks, or extra logos.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
